IE.title: LG Washing Machine IE Error
IE.summary: Water inlet timing failure observed on initialization.

drainage_fault.title: Washing Machine Drainage Issue
drainage_fault.summary: The unit fails to flush out wastewater before entering the high-speed spin cycle phase.
causes: Clogged low-level coin trap filter screen
Burnt internal drainage pump motor core coil
checks: Unscrew the low-level maintenance door and clear internal trap blockages manually.
Check back hose assembly points for compression creases.
repairs: Complete installation swap replacement of the primary drainage water exhaust pump assembly.

faq.q: Is stagnant water inside the drum hazardous?
faq.a: Yes, leaving water pooled for extended periods can damage door seals and leak onto underlying circuit pathways.
